headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Momentum Cooldown
summary: Recent performance snapshot With no single headline event driving trading, Charles Schwab (SCHW) has been moving on its overall business profile and recent returns, as investors weigh how the diversified model fits into their portfolios. The stock is up 2.7% over the past day and 2.5% over the past week, while the move over the past month is close to flat. Over the past 3 months, the share price has declined 2.7%, and year to date it is down 10.3%. Over a longer horizon, Charles Schwab shows...
